header_title.description: Vito ra pulatifomo leri kombisiwaka eka xihloko. Pulatifomo yo kuma swiresipe swa swakudya swa misava hinkwayo.

header_subtitle.description: Xivutiso lexi kombisiwaka ehansi ka vito ra pulatifomo eka xihloko.

home_page_hero_title.description: Xihloko lexikulu eka xiphemu xa hero xa peji ra le ka ndzhawu ya le ka khaya.

home_page_hero_subtitle.text: Hlaya swiresipe swa ntiyiso swa xikolo xa swakudya swa misava hinkwayo
home_page_hero_subtitle.description: Xivutiso lexi kombisiwaka ehansi ka xihloko xa hero eka peji ra le ka ndzhawu ya le ka khaya.

home_page_featured_title.description: Xihloko xa xiphemu lexi kombisiwaka eka xisungulo xa grid ya makhadi ya swiresipe.

recipe_card_cooking_time.description: Xiphemu xa nkarhi wa ku pheka eka khadi ra swiresipe. {minutes} yi hundzuluxiwa hi nhumeri ya timinete.

recipe_card_difficulty.description: Xiphemu lexi kombisiwaka eka xiphemu xa matimba eka khadi ra swiresipe.

recipe_card_easy.description: Xiphemu xa matimba lexi kombisiwaka eka swiresipe leswinga olovaka.

recipe_card_medium.description: Xiphemu xa matimba lexi kombisiwaka eka swiresipe leswinga olovaka swinene.

recipe_card_hard.description: Xiphemu xa matimba lexi kombisiwaka eka swiresipe leswinene swinene.

recipe_card_ramen_name.description: Vito ra swiresipe swa Tonkotsu Ramen.

recipe_card_ramen_description.text: Nyama ya nkhuku ya xihoko leyinene leyinene ni chashu leyinyenyana, nhova leyi tsakisaka, ni noodles leyin'wana.
recipe_card_ramen_description.description: Nhlamuselo ya swiresipe swa Tonkotsu Ramen.

recipe_card_margherita_name.description: Vito ra swiresipe swa Pizza ya Margherita.

recipe_card_margherita_description.text: Pizza ya Neapolitan ya xivumbeko xa khale ni tinambhu ta San Marzano, mozzarella leyintshwa, na basil.
recipe_card_margherita_description.description: Nhlamuselo ya swiresipe swa Pizza ya Margherita.

recipe_card_tacos_name.description: Vito ra swiresipe swa Tacos al Pastor.

recipe_card_tacos_description.text: Tacos ta nyama ya nkungu leyi koxiwaka ni pineapple, cilantro, na anyisi eka tortillas ya mbewu ya mhungu.
recipe_card_tacos_description.description: Nhlamuselo ya swiresipe swa Tacos al Pastor.

recipe_card_butter_chicken_name.description: Vito ra swiresipe swa Butter Chicken.

recipe_card_butter_chicken_description.text: Nyama ya nkhuku leyinyenyana eka swisi swa tamati ni butter swo tiya ni swiphephana swa xivumbeko.
recipe_card_butter_chicken_description.description: Nhlamuselo ya swiresipe swa Butter Chicken.

recipe_card_pad_thai_name.description: Vito ra swiresipe swa Pad Thai.

recipe_card_pad_thai_description.text: Noodles ya vhusiku byo hlelela hi shrimp, tofu, timpeleti, ni swisi swa tamarind.
recipe_card_pad_thai_description.description: Nhlamuselo ya swiresipe swa Pad Thai.

recipe_card_crepes_name.description: Vito ra swiresipe swa French Crepes.

recipe_card_crepes_description.text: Crepes leyinyenyana, leyi nga riki na moya leyipfukaka leyi tivelaka Nutella, masipala matsongo, ni swikombelo swa swikandza.
recipe_card_crepes_description.description: Nhlamuselo ya swiresipe swa French Crepes.

locale_switcher_label.description: Xiphemu lexi endlaka leswaku ku cinca ririmi eka xihloko.

locale_switcher_en.description: Nkombiso wa ririmi ra Xinghezi eka ku cinca ka ririmi.

locale_switcher_ja.description: Nkombiso wa ririmi ra Xijapani eka ku cinca ka ririmi.

locale_switcher_es.description: Nkombiso wa ririmi ra Xihispaniya eka ku cinca ka ririmi.
